title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 1–4, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WE'VE STOLEN TONS OF BOOTY, AND OUR NAME BRINGS TERROR TO ALL WHO HEAR IT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: SO ARE WE GONNA LET THREE LITTLE LOSERS MAKE FOOLS OF US!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: IT'S TIME TO SHOW OUR ENEMIES JUST HOW TERRYING WE CAN BE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's time for Mohji's wild animal show!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WE SHOULD BE FAR ENOUGH FROM THAT TAVERN.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: BUT WHAT ARE WE GONNA DO ABOUT THIS CAGE?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I CAN'T DO ANYTHING STUCK INSIDE THIS THING!

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: It's no use... lost too much blood...

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
